    <item>
        <guid>nba526930</guid>
        <title>Jrue Holiday: Strikes for 30 points</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jrue-holiday-3029</link>
        <description>Holiday totaled 30 points (10-21 FG, 7-15 3Pt, 3-3 FT), six rebounds, two assists and two steals in 32 minutes during Tuesday's 114-104 victory over the Clippers.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 31 Mar 2026 10:52:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba526929</guid>
        <title>Luka Doncic: Erupts for 42-point night</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/luka-doncic-4396</link>
        <description>Doncic registered 42 points (13-26 FG, 6-13 3Pt, 10-10 FT), five rebounds, 12 assists and two steals in 34 minutes during Tuesday's 127-113 win over the Cavaliers.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 31 Mar 2026 10:16:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba526928</guid>
        <title>John Collins: Makes quick stop in locker room</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/john-collins-4159</link>
        <description>Collins went to the locker room during the third quarter of Tuesday's game against the Trail Blazers due to an undisclosed injury, but he returned for the start of the fourth, Adam Ausland of Fox Sports Radio reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 31 Mar 2026 10:03:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba526921</guid>
        <title>Kevin Durant: Propels Houston to victory</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/kevin-durant-2811</link>
        <description>Durant finished Tuesday's 111-94 victory over the Knicks with 27 points (10-18 FG, 4-7 3Pt, 3-4 FT), six rebounds, eight assists and two blocks over 35 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 31 Mar 2026 8:28:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba526919</guid>
        <title>Brandon Ingram: Chips in 22 points in return</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/brandon-ingram-3861</link>
        <description>Ingram logged 22 points (7-15 FG, 1-6 3Pt, 7-8 FT) and one rebound over 31 minutes during the Raptors' 127-116 loss to the Pistons on Tuesday.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 31 Mar 2026 8:06:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
